title: Spicy Paneer Crepes
description: A French-inspired crepe filled with spicy paneer cheese. Perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt.
Heat a non-stick pan or crepe pan over medium heat.
Pour a small amount of batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the edges start to curl.
Loosen the crepe with a spatula and flip.
Cook for another minute, until the other side is lightly browned.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all crepes are made.
In a pan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add chili flakes and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add paneer and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble, place a crepe on a plate, add a spoonful of spicy paneer, and fold the crepe in half.
Repeat with the remaining crepes and paneer mixture.
